chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4444 of 2022 M/s National Bank of Pakistan Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 18704/25 2. For orders on CMA 18705/25 3. For orders on office objection. 4. For hearing of CMA 18951/22 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 18.09.2025 Mr. Abid Feroze, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shah Hussain, Deputy Attorney General. -.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application petitioner seeks withdrawal of this petition, which is accordingly allowed and the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
